scripts.setup: cp -n "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/.env.local" .env.local 2>/dev/null || true; cp -n "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/web/.env.local" apps/web/.env.local 2>/dev/null || true; for f in .env.local apps/web/.env.local; do [ -f "$f" ] && sed -i.bak "s|^NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=.*|NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=http://localhost:${CONDUCTOR_PORT:-3678}|" "$f" && rm -f "$f.bak"; done; pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
